creator: mizhka@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 166012
SVN diff file

Hi,

Here is patch for databases/py-whisper update to 0.9.15. Portlint & testport are attached. It works for me and my colleagues.

New file patch: databases/py-whisper/files/patch-whisper.py
The reason is that on i386 platform the size of C type off_t is 64 bits, but in Linux it's 32 bits. 

Please review it!

Thank you in advance,
  Michael.
